name: FRANKLIN WIRELESS CORP
summary: Franklin Wireless Corp (doing business as Franklin Access) is a global provider of integrated wireless solutions using 5G and 4G LTE technologies, including mobile hotspots, fixed wireless routers, and mobile device management (MDM) solutions. The company serves wireless operators, strategic partners, and distributors primarily in North America and Asia. It holds a 66.3% stake in R&D subsidiary Franklin Technology Inc. (FTI) in Seoul and a 60% stake in Sigbeat Inc. in San Diego.

products.name: 5G/4G LTE Wi-Fi Mobile Hotspot
products.description: Portable Wi-Fi hotspot routers providing wireless Internet access with 5G/4G support for multiple devices simultaneously.

products.name: 5G/4G Fixed Wireless Routers
products.description: Enhanced routing gateway supporting wired and wireless connectivity as a Cable or DSL service replacement.

products.name: 4G/5G M2M Gateway
products.description: Gateway supporting 4G and 5G networks for machine-to-machine communication in industrial and remote monitoring applications (in development).

products.name: On-Device Artificial Intelligence (AI)
products.description: AI capabilities integrated directly into devices for real-time edge data processing and decision-making for IoT applications (in development).

products.name: Quvo Family Guardian - Parental Controls
products.description: Comprehensive parental control features for managing and monitoring children's internet and application usage.

products.name: Quvo Family Guardian - Senior Care
products.description: Monitoring and assistance features tailored for the safety and well-being of elderly family members.

products.name: JEXtream MDM
products.description: Cloud-based telecom grade mobile device management platform ensuring security, compliance, and efficient operation across mobile environments.

products.name: JEXtream NMS
products.description: Network Management System providing tools for monitoring, managing, and optimizing network performance and connectivity.

partnerships.description: Electronic Manufacturing Services partner holding 40% of joint venture Sigbeat Inc., formed for worldwide telecom module sales and marketing.
